body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/currency/batch-save 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/currency/batch-save 
 ## 接口描述 
根据币种编码批量同步月汇率
1.新增的时候需要传入适用公司相关字段。
2.修改时不需要传适用公司相关字段，仅用作同步月汇率 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"root","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"currencyConfigList","required":false,"label":"%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%88%E4%B8%80%E6%AC%A1%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E5%90%8C%E6%AD%A550%E4%B8%AA%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%EF%BC%89","maxLength":"50"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"currencyCode","required":true,"label":"%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"USD","desc":"%20%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%88%E5%9B%BD%E5%AE%B6%E9%80%9A%E7%94%A8%E7%9A%84%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%89%EF%BC%8C%E5%8F%AF%E5%9C%A8%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%E7%9A%84%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%E6%B1%87%E7%8E%87%E7%BB%B4%E6%8A%A4%E9%A1%B5%E9%9D%A2%E6%9F%A5%E7%9C%8B","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"applyCompanyType","required":false,"label":"%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"ALL","desc":"%20ALL-%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%EF%BC%8CPART-%E9%83%A8%E5%88%86%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%0A%E6%B3%A8%EF%BC%9A%E8%AF%A5%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E5%8F%AA%E5%9C%A8%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E6%97%B6%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"applyCompanyLpcCodes","required":false,"label":"%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8","exampleValue":"%5B%5D","desc":"%20%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E7%9A%84%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E6%97%B6%E5%80%99%E4%BC%A0%E7%A9%BA%E6%95%B0%E7%BB%84%E3%80%82%0A%E6%B3%A8%EF%BC%9A%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%8F%AA%E5%9C%A8%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E6%97%B6%E5%80%99%E7%94%9F%E6%95%88","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"currencyBizCode","required":true,"label":"%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"88888888","desc":"%20%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E4%B8%8B%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"periodRates","required":false,"label":"%E6%B1%87%E7%8E%87%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E6%B1%87%E7%8E%87%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%88%E4%B8%80%E6%AC%A1%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E5%90%8C%E6%AD%A5%E4%B8%80%E5%B9%B4%E7%9A%84%E6%B1%87%E7%8E%87%EF%BC%89","maxLength":"12"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"ratePeriod","required":true,"label":"%E6%B1%87%E7%8E%87%E5%91%A8%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2025-01","desc":"%20%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E5%8F%AA%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%9C%88%E6%B1%87%E7%8E%87%EF%BC%8C%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BA%EF%BC%9A2023-01","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"exchangeRate","required":true,"label":"%E6%B1%87%E7%8E%87","exampleValue":"7.033333","desc":"%20%E7%B2%BE%E7%A1%AE%E5%88%B06%E4%BD%8D%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E8%B6%B3%E8%A1%A50","maxLength":"(17,6)"}}]}],"open":false}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"root","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"body","label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E4%BF%9D%E5%AD%98%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E6%9C%AA%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%9A%84%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{
    "currencyConfigList": [
        {
            "currencyCode": "USD",
            "applyCompanyType": "ALL",
            "currencyBizCode": "333",
            "periodRates": [
                {
                    "ratePeriod": "2025-01",
                    "exchangeRate": 7.033
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}
```
### 响应报文
```json
{  
    "body": "保存成功",    
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",    
    "success": true,    
    "message": "成功"    
}  
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | E0002| 币种代码不能为空|输入币种代码 |
 | E0002| 币种编码不能为空|输入编码代码 |
 | E0002| 汇率周期不能为空|输入汇率代码 |
 | E0002| 汇率不能为空|输入汇率代码 |
 | E0002| 币种代码不可超过50位|缩减币种代码 |
 | E0002| 币种编码不可超过50位|缩减币种编码 |
 | E0002| 不支持的币种代码：XXX|输入正确的币种代码|
 | E0002| 不合法的汇率周期 |输入正确的汇率周期|
 | E0002| 不合法的适用公司类型 |输入正确的适用公司类型|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/currency/batch-save

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/currency/batch-save

接口描述

根据币种编码批量同步月汇率
1.新增的时候需要传入适用公司相关字段。
2.修改时不需要传适用公司相关字段，仅用作同步月汇率

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"root","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"currencyConfigList","required":false,"label":"%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%88%E4%B8%80%E6%AC%A1%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E5%90%8C%E6%AD%A550%E4%B8%AA%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%EF%BC%89","maxLength":"50"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"currencyCode","required":true,"label":"%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"USD","desc":"%20%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%88%E5%9B%BD%E5%AE%B6%E9%80%9A%E7%94%A8%E7%9A%84%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%89%EF%BC%8C%E5%8F%AF%E5%9C%A8%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%E7%9A%84%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%E6%B1%87%E7%8E%87%E7%BB%B4%E6%8A%A4%E9%A1%B5%E9%9D%A2%E6%9F%A5%E7%9C%8B","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"applyCompanyType","required":false,"label":"%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"ALL","desc":"%20ALL-%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%EF%BC%8CPART-%E9%83%A8%E5%88%86%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%0A%E6%B3%A8%EF%BC%9A%E8%AF%A5%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E5%8F%AA%E5%9C%A8%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E6%97%B6%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"applyCompanyLpcCodes","required":false,"label":"%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8","exampleValue":"%5B%5D","desc":"%20%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E7%9A%84%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E6%97%B6%E5%80%99%E4%BC%A0%E7%A9%BA%E6%95%B0%E7%BB%84%E3%80%82%0A%E6%B3%A8%EF%BC%9A%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%8F%AA%E5%9C%A8%E6%96%B0%E5%A2%9E%E6%97%B6%E5%80%99%E7%94%9F%E6%95%88","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"currencyBizCode","required":true,"label":"%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"88888888","desc":"%20%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E4%B8%8B%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"periodRates","required":false,"label":"%E6%B1%87%E7%8E%87%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E6%B1%87%E7%8E%87%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%88%E4%B8%80%E6%AC%A1%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E5%90%8C%E6%AD%A5%E4%B8%80%E5%B9%B4%E7%9A%84%E6%B1%87%E7%8E%87%EF%BC%89","maxLength":"12"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"ratePeriod","required":true,"label":"%E6%B1%87%E7%8E%87%E5%91%A8%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2025-01","desc":"%20%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E5%8F%AA%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%9C%88%E6%B1%87%E7%8E%87%EF%BC%8C%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BA%EF%BC%9A2023-01","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"exchangeRate","required":true,"label":"%E6%B1%87%E7%8E%87","exampleValue":"7.033333","desc":"%20%E7%B2%BE%E7%A1%AE%E5%88%B06%E4%BD%8D%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E8%B6%B3%E8%A1%A50","maxLength":"(17,6)"}}]}],"open":false}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"root","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"body","label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E4%BF%9D%E5%AD%98%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E6%9C%AA%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%9A%84%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

  1. {  

  2.     "currencyConfigList": [  

  3.         {  

  4.             "currencyCode": "USD",  

  5.             "applyCompanyType": "ALL",  

  6.             "applyCompanyLpcCodes ": [],  

  7.             "currencyBizCode": "333",  

  8.             "periodRates": [  

  9.                 {  

  10.                     "ratePeriod": "2025-01",  

  11.                     "exchangeRate": 7.033  

  12.                 }  

  13.             ]  

  14.         }  

  15.     ]  

  16. }

响应报文

  1. {    

  2.     "body": "保存成功",      

  3.     "returnCode": "SUC0000",      

  4.     "success": true,      

  5.     "message": "成功"      

  6. }

错误码说明

错误码错误信息解决方案
E0002币种代码不能为空输入币种代码
E0002币种编码不能为空输入编码代码
E0002汇率周期不能为空输入汇率代码
E0002汇率不能为空输入汇率代码
E0002币种代码不可超过50位缩减币种代码
E0002币种编码不可超过50位缩减币种编码
E0002不支持的币种代码：XXX输入正确的币种代码
E0002不合法的汇率周期输入正确的汇率周期
E0002不合法的适用公司类型输入正确的适用公司类型
